1 Anakin’s Redemption

2 Big Love: Aftermath

Fan fic set eighteen months after the death of Bill Henrickson, this story visits the characters of Big Love to see what happens next...and fix the few errors made by the show's writers.

3 Fuller House Fourth of July Week

Becky Donaldson-Katsopolis is tired of the naughty family secrets and has decided to spill them all sooner rather than later, including her own. First on her list to bring in on the plan are her co-host, Danny Tanner, and his girlfriend, Vicky. This is my Fourth of July Challenge entry.
[More Info]

6 The Groom Who Didn't Care

This is kind of a fan fic based on the Bible, one of the most bizarre works of literature ever written in history. It seemed better placed under this pen name therefore as the story of an ancient Israelite who didn't care that his bride might not be a virgin. He also didn't care much for rules or traditions at all if they didn't make sense to him.
[More Info]

8 Modern Family: Claire's Father's Day Gift

Claire Dunphy from Modern Family cooks up the most delicious plan for a Father's Day present to both her father, Jay, and her husband, Phil. It involves Gloria, her stepmom, yet none of these know that Claire's two daughters have plans and schemes of their own, all quite kinky.

9 Modern Family: Manny's Pills

Luke Dunphy tries out some new sample pills from Manny on his sisters, Alex and Haley. They pretend to be mind-controlled by them and then force them down his throat, dominating him through the power of suggestion. It only gets weirder from there.
[More Info]
